ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vectors" (
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vector */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the vector */,
  "expressed_protein" TEXT /* Protein expressed by the vector */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain from which the protein is derived */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag used for protein detection */,
  "vector_type" TEXT /* Type of the vector (e.g., Mammalian, Baculovirus) */,
  "du_number" TEXT /* DU number assigned to the vector */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL for requesting the vector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vector */,
  "vector_format" TEXT /* Format of the vector (e.g., plasmid, virus) */,
  "expression_system" TEXT /* Expression system used by the vector (e.g., mammalian, baculovirus, bacterial) */,
  "selection_marker" TEXT /* Selection marker used in the vector (e.g., antibiotic resistance) */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the vector is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vector available */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the vector entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the vector entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the vector entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the vector entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vector being requested */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vector requested */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "request_status_history" TEXT /* History of the request status changes */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the request */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the vector was delivered to the requester */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method used to deliver the vector (e.g., hand-delivery, shipping) */,
  "received_by" INTEGER /* User who received the vector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_requests_vector_id FOREIGN KEY ("vector_id") REFERENCES vectors ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the user's lab */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vector_requests_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request history entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request */,
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vector */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vector requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vector_requests_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES research_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vector_requests_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vector_requests_history_vector_id FOREIGN KEY ("vector_id") REFERENCES vectors ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vector_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage entry */,
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vector */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the vector is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vector stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vector_storage_vector_id FOREIGN KEY ("vector_id") REFERENCES vectors ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
